overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a foggy lakeside boardwalk. The character walks along wooden planks past a ticket booth and outdoor seating, ventures down a narrow pier to a gazebo, encounters a mysterious woman in red, and follows her back toward a park entrance.

events.description: character turns right at the broken pier section to continue along the main boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy wooden boardwalk past a lakeside cafe. The Rosewater Park sign and iron fence line the left side while a broken pier section is visible to the right. The character turns right at the intersection, passing a ticket booth and information board.

scene_state.functional_zone: boardwalk outdoor seating area with cafe tables and food cart

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past outdoor cafe seating and approaching a food cart

entered.detail: round metal tables with ornate designs
ornate metal chairs with curved armrests
wooden food stand with striped awning and stool
metal viewing telescope mounted on wooden post facing the water

segments.scene_description: The boardwalk opens into an outdoor seating area with metal tables and chairs arranged along the right side. A food cart with a striped awning sits ahead while decorative string lights hang overhead. The character walks past a coin-operated telescope viewer facing the foggy water.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pier extension over water with warning signs and railings

events.description: boardwalk narrows significantly as character enters the pier extension section

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow pier extension toward the gazebo structure at the end

entered.detail: white sign with red border reading 'NO SWIMMING'
white wooden railings along the narrow pier extension
red and white life ring mounted on wooden post
covered wooden pavilion at the end of the pier

segments.scene_description: The boardwalk narrows into a confined pier extension with white railings on both sides. Warning signs and a life preserver station are visible as the character walks toward a gazebo structure at the pier's end, with the foggy water visible through the wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier and boardwalk while following a woman in red back toward park entrance

events.description: screen briefly darkens indicating a transition or time skip as character reaches gazebo
woman in red jacket suddenly appears walking ahead on the pier

agents.ego_description: following the woman in the red jacket as she leads the way back along the pier and boardwalk toward the park entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in red jacket and black skirt walking ahead, leading the way back toward the park

entered.detail: covered wooden pavilion with open sides at the pier terminus
ornate iron gate with stone pillars marking Rosewater Park entrance

segments.scene_description: After a brief darkness, the character encounters a woman in red at the gazebo and begins following her back along the pier. They return to the main boardwalk, passing the food cart and outdoor seating again, and approach the Rosewater Park entrance with its iron gate and stone pillars.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy lakeside boardwalk that leads deep into a pier before retreating back toward a park entrance. It begins with the character walking past a lakeside cafe and the Rosewater Park sign, turning right past a ticket booth and information board. As the path opens, the camera moves through an outdoor seating area filled with metal tables and a striped food cart under hanging string lights, passing a telescope viewer facing the mist. The scene then narrows into a confined pier extension with white railings and warning signs, pushing forward toward a gazebo at the water's edge. After a brief moment of darkness, the camera follows a woman in red as she leads the character back along the pier and through the seating area, finally returning to the iron gates and stone pillars of the park entrance.
